sections.subtitle: Inter's Recent Form
sections.text: Inter have shown strong form in their last 5 matches, securing 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss. They have been prolific in attack, scoring 13 goals, with standout performances from players like Marcus Thuram. However, defensive lapses have seen them concede in most games.

sections.subtitle: Torino's Recent Form
sections.text: Torino's last 5 matches resulted in 2 wins and 3 losses, indicating inconsistency. They've struggled defensively, conceding 10 goals, while their attack has been moderate with 7 goals scored. Their away form is particularly concerning.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Inter dominate the head-to-head record, winning both of the last two encounters against Torino (3-2 at home and 2-0 away). They've scored 5 goals while conceding 2 in these matches, showcasing their superiority.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics and Streaks
sections.text: Inter's streak of 4 wins and tendency to score first in head-to-head games (6/6) gives them an edge. Torino's struggles in the first half and lack of clean sheets in 12 head-to-head matches further tilt the balance. Both teams often see under 4.5 cards and 10.5 corners in matches.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, Inter leads Torino 2-0 at the San Siro. Inter has dominated much of the first half with a strong attacking presence and clinical finishing. Goals from Alessandro Bastoni and Marcus Thuram have given them a comfortable cushion. Torino, while showing some resilience, has struggled to convert their limited chances into meaningful threats. The stats reflect Inter's superiority in possession and penetration in the final third, setting the tone for this matchup.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: Inter started the game with a clear intent to dominate, pushing forward with consistent attacking spells in the opening minutes. There were brief moments where Torino tried to shift the momentum in their favor, particularly around the middle of the half, but Inter quickly regained control with sustained pressure. Key attacking surges from Inter, especially around the times of their goals, highlighted their ability to capitalize on momentum shifts. Torino had a few notable attacking moments towards the latter stages of the half but lacked the cutting edge to challenge Inter's defense.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key performers
halftimeSections.text: Alessandro Bastoni has been a standout for Inter, not only scoring the opener but also contributing defensively. Marcus Thuram’s goal further solidified Inter's lead, showcasing his threat in the final third. Nicolò Barella and Federico Dimarco have been pivotal in creating opportunities with their incisive play. For Torino, players like Nikola Vlašić and Cesare Casadei showed glimpses of intent, but their impact has been limited due to Inter's control of the game.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team dynamics and tactics
halftimeSections.text: Inter's approach has been characterized by high possession and effective entries into the final third, allowing them to dictate the tempo. Their ability to win duels and maintain pressure has stifled Torino’s attempts to build play. Torino, on the other hand, has struggled with fewer entries into dangerous areas and a lack of possession in key zones. They’ve shown some organization defensively but have been unable to cope with Inter's attacking fluidity.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Looking ahead to the second half, Inter is likely to maintain their dominance and push for more goals, especially with their attacking players in form. Torino will need to take more risks if they hope to get back into the game, potentially leaving gaps at the back. Inter could exploit these openings, particularly through players like Lautaro Martínez, who has been involved but is yet to get on the scoresheet. Torino’s chances of a comeback seem slim unless they can drastically improve their attacking output.
